examples: As volcano eruption is deemed to be an uninsurable risk, there are few studies to turn to.
For the most part, faulty work is considered an uninsurable business risk that contractors must retain.
Uninsurable risk: one that cannot be clearly described or calculated and is not often met, so that no insurer will insure.
